name: Bestest Little Nest
description: A small bed that can be seen at the Clink-Clank Krumkake Craftshop. It has a sturdy metal bed frame and pink bedding with a cute pattern and a soft pillow. It offers an excellent experience as its generous dimensions and height allow the user to sleep soundly in any position.\n"This is the best bed I've ever slept in!" said the proud creator who crafted this bed with their very own hands.
